export interface Sequence { __SEROVAL_SEQUENCE__: true; v: unknown[]; t: number; d: number; } export declare function isSequence(value: object): value is Sequence; export declare function createSequence(values: unknown[], throwAt: number, doneAt: number): Sequence; export declare function createSequenceFromIterable<T>(source: Iterable<T>): Sequence; export declare function sequenceToIterator<T>(sequence: Sequence): () => IterableIterator<T>; //# sourceMappingURL=sequence.d.ts.map
